questions.question: Describe the process of image formation in terms of photometric image. Explain the role of lenses in this process.
questions.hint: Focus on the key concepts of photometric image and lenses in image formation.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a photometric image and a radiometric image? Provide an example to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the key differences between photometric and radiometric images.

questions.question: Sketch the process of image formation from a light source to a photometric image, labeling the key components involved.
questions.hint: Focus on accurately depicting the image formation process and labeling the key components.
